ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "winner_party" TEXT /* Political party of the winner */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin of victory */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated */,
  "voting_system" TEXT /* Type of voting system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_winner_party FOREIGN KEY ("winner_party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the current party leader */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "party_logo" TEXT /* Reference to the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting statistic */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the party */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the party */,
  "swing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in votes compared to the previous election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter's demographic information */,
  "voted_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the voter voted for the winner */,
  "voter_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Current status of the voter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "voter_history" TEXT /* Reference to the voter's past voting history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the voters */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the voters */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the voters */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method by which the voter cast their vote */,
  "voting_location" TEXT /* Location where the voter cast their vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_participation_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_participation_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  "access_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's access was granted */,
  "access_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, campaign strategist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the action pertained to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_winner" TEXT /* Predicted winner of the election */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_winner FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_winner") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the visualization is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the visualization file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
